mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment ( bid_idx, mem_idx, payment_key, order_id, pay_method, pay_amount, pay_status, buyer_name, buyer_tel, buyer_addr, buyer_zipcode, escrow_status, pay_regdate ) VALUES ( #{bidIdx}, #{memIdx}, #{paymentKey}, #{orderId}, #{payMethod}, #{payAmount}, 'READY', #{buyerName}, #{buyerTel}, #{buyerAddr}, #{buyerZipcode}, 'READY', NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE auction SET auction_status_idx = 8 WHERE auction_idx = ( SELECT auction_idx FROM bid WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx} )
